Package org.mitre.synthea.modules

Class QualityOfLifeModule

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.engine.Module
org.mitre.synthea.modules.QualityOfLifeModule
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable
public class QualityOfLifeModule extends Module
A module for calculating quality of life metrics such as QALY, DALY, and QOLS. This module processes a person's health data to compute these metrics annually.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    • clone

      public Module clone()
      Description copied from class: Module
      Clone this module. Never provide the original.
      Overrides:
      clone in class Module

    • process

      public boolean process(Person person, long time)
      Description copied from class: Module
      Process this Module with the given Person at the specified time within the simulation. Processing will complete if the person dies.
      Overrides:
      process in class Module
      Parameters:
      person - : the person being simulated
      time - : the date within the simulated world
      Returns:
      completed : whether or not this Module completed.

    • loadDisabilityWeights

      protected static Map<String,org.mitre.synthea.modules.QualityOfLifeModule.DisabilityWeight> loadDisabilityWeights()
      Load the disability weights from the gbd_disability_weights.csv file.
      Returns:
      Map of clinical terminology codes (e.g. "44054006") to DisabilityWeight objects.

    • calculate

      public static double[] calculate(Person person, long stop)
      Calculate the HALYs for this person, at the given time. HALYs include QALY and DALY.
      Parameters:
      person - Person to calculate
      stop - current timestamp
      Returns:
      array of [daly (cumulative), qaly (cumulative), current disability weight]

    • conditionsInYear

      protected static List<HealthRecord.Entry> conditionsInYear(List<HealthRecord.Entry> conditions, long start, long stop)
      Given a list of conditions, return a subset that was active during a given time period indicated by stop and stop.
      Parameters:
      conditions - The given list of conditions.
      start - The start of the time period the condition must be active.
      stop - The stop or end of the time period the condition must be active.
      Returns:
      Subset of input conditions that were active given the specified time period.

    • weight

      protected static double weight(double disabilityWeight, int age)
      Calculates the age-adjusted disability weight for a single year.
      Parameters:
      disabilityWeight - The unadjusted disability weight.
      age - The age of the person during the year being adjusted.
      Returns:
      The age-adjusted disability weight during a specified age/year.

    • inventoryAttributes

      public static void inventoryAttributes(Map<String,Attributes.Inventory> attributes)
      Populate the given attribute map with the list of attributes that this module reads/writes with example values when appropriate.
      Parameters:
      attributes - Attribute map to populate.
